pkgmetadata.longdescription: Base36 in PythonYet another implementation for the positional numeral system using 36 as the radix.Installation------------ pip install base36Usage----- import base36 assert base36.dumps(19930503) bv6h3 assert base36.loads(bv6h3) 19930503Issues------If you want to report bugs or request features, please create issues onGitHub Issues httpsgithub.comtonyseekpython-base36issues_.Contributes-----------You can send a pull reueqst onGitHub httpsgithub.comtonyseekpython-base36pulls_... Coverage Status image httpsimg.shields.iocoverallstonyseekpython-base36.svgstyleflat target httpscoveralls.iortonyseekpython-base36 alt Coverage Status..
